summary: Clean positioning throughout the canonical route. Each surface has a clear job, no internal mechanics leak onto top-level pages, the README→START_HERE→docs/README journey is coherent, and promoted next-click pages reinforce the same story instead of fighting it.

strongestEvidence.reason: Leads with 'operating system for autonomous coding' tagline, positions as AI agent orchestrator with simple-yet-composable core, ships strong default, cleanly defers to public route. Exactly what the positioning doc asks for.
Result-first framing ('judge by what software does now and what checks ran'), good/bad task list, clean install steps, no internal plumbing. Perfect first-run page.
Proper switchboard with three clear routes, explicitly tells users 'keep proof secondary,' links to product-framing pages that reinforce the same central positioning. No stale framing.

Explicitly scopes itself as 'supporting proof... not the main product pitch.' Evidence hierarchy (working behavior → real checks → written scope → supporting artifacts) matches the positioning doc's evaluation order exactly.

Cleanly frames the comparison question around workflow comprehensibility at scale. 'Simple at the center, stronger in composition, useful before customization.' Reinforces rather than competes with the main journey.
